description_long: This fence is constructed from thick, vertical wooden planks framed by two robust square posts at either end, each capped with a large, stone-like block. The wood is reinforced with horizontal metal bands, giving the structure a fortified appearance. The posts and rails are accented with metallic bolts and bands, suggesting durability and strength. The wood has a rich, brown color with visible grain and subtle weathering, while the metal elements are a dark, worn gray. The top of the fence is slightly arched, with the posts rising higher than the central section. The overall design is utilitarian yet sturdy, suitable for demarcating boundaries in parks, streets, or urban gardens.
description: A sturdy wooden fence with thick posts capped by stone-like blocks and reinforced with metal bands, featuring a slightly arched top and visible bolts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the fence, with both posts, the arched wooden panels, and metal reinforcements clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of a single post, with the cap and metal banding visible but the wooden panels mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the wooden panels and posts, with metal bands and bolts also visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the thickness of the post and the cap from the other side.
